title: Veltrix 1.0 is live!
summary: First public release — every Minecraft version, Microsoft login, mods with one-click FPS boost, skin studio and cosmetics.

title: One-click FPS boost
summary: Open Mods, hit the Performance tab and apply the Sodium + Lithium pack tuned to your Minecraft version.

title: Grab any player's skin
summary: Type a username in the Skins tab and their skin lands straight in your library.
